army_rules.name: The Shadow of Chaos
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is LEGIONES DAEMONICA , certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, as follows: Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. DAEMONIC MANIFESTATION While a LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a BATTLELINE unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead). DAEMONIC TERROR While an enemy unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos and/or it is within 6" of one or more BLOODTHIRSTER , GREAT UNCLEAN ONE , KAIROS FATEWEAVER , KEEPER OF SECRETS , LORD OF CHANGE , ROTIGUS , SHALAXI HELBANE or SKARBRAND units from your army, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

army_rules.name: Daemonic Pact
army_rules.description: If every model from your army has the CHAOS KNIGHTS or HERETIC ASTARTES keyword, you can include LEGIONES DAEMONICA units in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. The combined points cost of such units you can include depends on your battle size, as shown below. Incursion - Up to 250 pts Strike Force - Up to 500 pts Onslaught - Up to 750 pts None of these models can be your WARLORD , and they cannot be given Enhancements. In addition, for each of the following keywords, the number of non- BATTLELINE units with that keyword you include in this way cannot be greater than the number of BATTLELINE units with that keyword you include in this way: KHORNE TZEENTCH NURGLE SLAANESH

detachment_rule.name: Murdercall
detachment_rule.description: In your opponent's movement phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT ) ends a move within 8" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units from your army, one of those LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units can make a surge move of up to D6".'

enhancements.name: Brazenmaw
enhancements.description: Add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Fury’s Cage
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3+1 mortal wounds, and until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Gateway Unto Damnation
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, if the bearer has destroyed one or more enemy units this battle, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+3 ability, instead of any other Deadly Demise ability on its datasheet.

enhancements.name: Slaughterthirst (Aura)
enhancements.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit (excluding MONSTERS ) is within 6" of the bearer, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Wrath Undeniable
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Gore-hungry Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Skulls Beget Blood
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE INFANTRY or LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding units that Fell Back this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Blood Begets Skulls
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that has not been selected to charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Fool’s Flight
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a fall‑back move .
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit that is within 6" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Declare a charge with your unit. When selecting charge targets , you can only select enemy units that made a fall‑back move this phase and are within the maximum distance .

stratagems.name: Sheathed In Brass
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a Save characteristic of 3+.

detachment_rule.name: Unholy Avalanche
detachment_rule.description: If a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit made a fall‑back move this turn, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to shoot/eligible to declare a charge .

enhancements.name: Apocalyptic Steeds (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit has +1" M .

enhancements.name: Soul-shattering Charge (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: When this unit is selected to fight , if this unit made a charge move this turn, you can use this ability. If you do, when determining which models in this unit can fight, friendly models that are within 3" of enemy units engaged with this unit can target those enemy units.

stratagems.name: From Beyond the Veil
stratagems.when: End of the Movement phase, from the start of the battle.
stratagems.target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit in strategic reserves .
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make an ingress move .

stratagems.name: Inescapable Manifestations
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fall‑back move , if that unit is engaged with a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
stratagems.target: That Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall‑back move , that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode . If that enemy unit is battle‑shocked , -1 from those hazard rolls .

stratagems.name: Warp-riders
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit is selected to move .
stratagems.target: That Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has Mobile .

detachment_rule.name: Warp Rifts
detachment_rule.description: Each time a LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, and/or if it is set up wholly within 6" of one or more friendly BLOODTHIRSTER , GREAT UNCLEAN ONE , KAIROS FATEWEAVER , KEEPER OF SECRETS , LORD OF CHANGE , ROTIGUS , SHALAXI HELBANE or SKARBRAND units with which it shares the KHORNE , TZEENTCH , NURGLE or SLAANESH keyword, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 8".

enhancements.name: A’rgath, The King of Blades
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Soulstealer
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer destroys an enemy model with a melee attack, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. On a 4+, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: The Endless Gift
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: The Everstave
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons and increase the Range characteristic of such weapons by 3". While the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons and increase the Range characteristic of such weapons by 6" instead.

stratagems.name: Corrupt Realspace
stratagems.when: Start of any Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is said to be Corrupted and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. In addition, while an objective marker is Corrupted and under your control, the area of the battlefield within 6" of that objective marker is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Draught of Terror
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. In addition, until the end of the phase, each time such a weapon targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Warp Surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Denizens of the Warp
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: The Realm of Chaos
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s turn.
stratagems.target: Up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA units from your army that are within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, or one other LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. They will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Invulnerability
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of that enemy unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in your unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

detachment_rule.name: Beguiling Aura
detachment_rule.description: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Avatar of Perfection
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: At the start of each phase, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of the bearer, you can: re‑roll Advance rolls made for the bearer; re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer; ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to any Advance and/or Charge rolls made for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Dreaming Crown (Aura)
enhancements.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTERS ) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: False Majesty (Aura)
enhancements.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTERS ) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Soul Glutton
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more enemy models were destroyed this phase as a result of one or more of the bearer’s attacks, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it regains up to D3 lost wounds.

stratagems.name: Thieves of Pain
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an attack or mortal wound is allocated to a model in a LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ).
stratagems.target: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one other friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit that is within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.

stratagems.name: Archagonists
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER unit or up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units (excluding MONSTERS ) from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Sensory Excruciation
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Each unit on the battlefield that is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if they are Below Half‑strength.

stratagems.name: Phantasmal Longing
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Cavalcade of Blades
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or roll six D6 instead if your unit is a MONSTER unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Excess
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

detachment_rule.name: Loci of Power
detachment_rule.description: Friendly Legiones Daemonica Character models (excluding Monster models) have +1 Ld and OC .

enhancements.name: Swollen with Power (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: Legiones Daemonica Character model only (excluding Monster units). This model has +2 W .

stratagems.name: Carnival of Excess
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when an enemy unit has fought .
stratagems.target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Character Slaanesh unit (excluding Monster units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has Fights First and must be the next unit you select to fight .

stratagems.name: Call to Murder
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly Legiones Daemonica Khorne Character unit (excluding Monster units) that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight .
stratagems.target: That Legiones Daemonica Character Khorne unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A .

stratagems.name: skirling magicks
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA CHARACTER TZEENTCH unit (excluding MONSTER units) is selected to shoot .
stratagems.target: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA CHARACTER TZEENTCH unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks have [LETHAL HITS] .

stratagems.name: Bilious Blessing
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Character Nurgle unit (excluding Monster units).
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 8" of your unit and roll seven D6:

detachment_rule.name: Melancholic Miasma
detachment_rule.description: While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE units from your army, that enemy unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. In each player’s Command phase, select one enemy unit within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Cankerblight (Aura)
enhancements.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) that is within 6" of the bearer fails a Battle‑shock test, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Each time the bearer uses this Enhancement, no mortal wounds are inflicted by your army’s Daemonic Terror rule.

enhancements.name: Droning Shroud (Aura)
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Font of Spores (Aura)
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Maggot Maws
enhancements.description: In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 6" of the bearer; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. Then roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Each time the bearer uses this Enhancement, no mortal wounds are inflicted by your army’s Daemonic Terror rule.

stratagems.name: Seeping Virulence
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Fever Visions
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. After your unit has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

stratagems.name: Foetid Resurgence
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit, or up to D3 destroyed models instead if your unit is a BATTLELINE unit, with their full wounds remaining. If it is a MONSTER unit, one model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Rot and Renewal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Murkshadows
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal move, add 5" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Plague of Woes
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase, before selecting any targets for the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after an enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test as a result of the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule, select one other enemy unit within 9" of your unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

detachment_rule.name: Fates In Flux
detachment_rule.description: You start the battle with three Flux tokens (we recommend using a dice to track how many Flux tokens you have). You can spend one Flux token just after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw or Hazardous test is made for a LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH model or LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army to re‑roll the result of that roll, throw or test. Flux tokens can also be spent to enhance the effect of some Stratagems. Each time you spend a Flux token, reduce the number of Flux tokens you have by one and your opponent gains one Flux token. Whenever your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, they can spend one Flux token after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw is made for a model or unit from their army, to re‑roll the result of that roll or throw. If they do, they reduce the number of Flux tokens they have by one and you gain one Flux token. This is ignored if your opponent has the Fates in Flux Detachment rule. In your Command phase, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one Flux token. Designer’s Note : When using fast dice rolling, this rule can be used to spend any number of Flux tokens (up to the amount you have), to re‑roll a number of dice up to the amount spent, after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.

enhancements.name: Improbable Shield (Aura)
enhancements.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Inescapable Eye
enhancements.description: In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one additional Flux token.

enhancements.name: Infernal Puppeteer
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: In your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, you can select one other friendly visible LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit within 9" of the bearer. If you do, when selecting targets for ranged weapons equipped by the bearer, you can measure range and determine visibility from one model of your choice in the selected unit instead. Designer’s Note: When determining if a unit with the Lone Operative ability can be selected as the target, the range is determined from the model of your choice in the selected unit.

enhancements.name: Neverblade
enhancements.restriction: LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER model only.
enhancements.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Impossible Eclipse
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Select No Man’s Land or your opponent’s deployment zone, or spend one Flux token and select both. Until the end of the phase, the selected areas of the battlefield are within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Pyrogenesis
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight that phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit, or spend one Flux token and add 3 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 instead.

stratagems.name: Flickering Reality
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6, then you can spend one Flux token to re‑roll the result: until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll (after any re‑roll) of that result, the attack sequence ends, even if the original Hit roll would have been a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Fateborne Nightmares
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Ficklefire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets for, and resolving attacks with, ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model is destroyed while its unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Delirium Unmade
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Alternatively, you can spend one Flux token when you use this Stratagem and target up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH units from your army instead (including those within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units).
stratagems.effect: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

detachment_rule.name: Thralls of the First Prince
detachment_rule.description: When mustering your army, you cannot include any DAEMON PRINCE , DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS or EPIC HERO units (excluding BE’LAKOR ), but you can include the following HERETIC ASTARTES units: CHAOS LORD CHAOS LORD IN TERMINATOR ARMOUR CHAOS LORD WITH JUMP PACK CHAOS TERMINATOR SQUAD CHOSEN DAMNED units DARK APOSTLE HAVOCS LEGIONARIES MASTER OF POSSESSION POSSESSED RAPTORS SORCERER SORCERER IN TERMINATOR ARMOUR WARP TALONS The combined points value of such units depends on your battle size, as shown below. Incursion: Up to 500 pts Strike Force: Up to 1000 pts Onslaught: Up to 1500 pts

enhancements.name: Fade to Darkness
enhancements.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Leaping Shadows
enhancements.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9” ability.

enhancements.name: Malice Made Manifest
enhancements.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2‐5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Gloom (Aura)
enhancements.description: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Spiteful Demise
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a SHADOW LEGION unit from your army is destroyed, before removing the last model in that unit from the battlefield and before rolling any dice for the Deadly Demise ability.
stratagems.target: That SHADOW LEGION unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of the last model in your unit, adding 2 to the result if your unit has the SLAANESH keyword: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Channelled Wrath
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SHADOW LEGION unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit has the KHORNE keyword, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Death Denied
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One SHADOW LEGION unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, If your unit has the TZEENTCH keyword, return up to one destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: Encroaching Darkness
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to one SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army and up to one SHADOW LEGION LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army. You can only select units that arrived from Reserves this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your selected units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Shade Path
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly SHADOW LEGION unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. When that enemy unit declares a charge, that enemy unit has -1 to charge rolls. If your unit has Nurgle , that enemy unit must make a battle-shock roll.

stratagems.name: Binding Shadow
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to one SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army and up to one SHADOW LEGION LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army. You can only select units that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove those selected units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

detachment_rule.name: shudderblink
detachment_rule.description: When a friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit is selected to make an advance move : That unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn. That move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to declare a charge .

enhancements.name: Bane-forged Weapons (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit’s attacks have +1 S .

enhancements.name: Soul-hungry Slaughterers (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention/Fire Overwatch stratagem , that use is ‑1 CP.

stratagems.name: Soulseeing
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range .

stratagems.name: Incorporeal Entities
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit.
stratagems.target: That Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit.
stratagems.effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls .

stratagems.name: Daemonic Infestation
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit (excluding PINK HORRORS units).
stratagems.effect: Your unit heals 3 wounds.
